title: Module 3: Forms & Logic
description: Forms ko sundar banana aur JavaScript ka asli dimaag (Logic) seekhna.

chapters.title: 1. Styling Forms
chapters.content:
Boring forms kisi ko pasand nahi. CSS se hum inputs ko sundar bana sakte hain.

  • Padding: Input ke andar jagah banane ke liye.
  • Border: Color change karne ke liye.
  • :focus: Jab user click kare to style badalna.

chapters.title: 2. Validation (Sahi Data)
chapters.content:
Agar user email ki jagah naam likh de to? Validation zaroori hai.

HTML5 humein required, minlength, aur type='email' jaise tools deta hai bina JS ke check karne ke liye.

chapters.title: 3. JavaScript Logic (The Brain)
chapters.content:
Ab tak humne sirf design kiya. Ab hum 'Sochna' seekhenge.

  • Variables: Data ko save karne ke liye dabbe (Box).
  • Functions: Ek kaam ko baar-baar karne wali machine.
  • If/Else: Decision lene ki taakat (Agar ye hua to wo karo).
